description: ExposoGraph 3.0 ontology class definitions (Layer 0 Phase 2 — full hierarchy)

entity_classes.label: Entity
entity_classes.description: Root class for all ExposoGraph ontology entities. Every class inherits from Entity.

entity_classes.label: Exposure Agent
entity_classes.description: Abstract class for exogenous agents capable of causing biological effects upon exposure. Includes carcinogens, toxicants, and environmental agents.

entity_classes.label: Biological Entity
entity_classes.description: Abstract class for biological macromolecules, including proteins, enzymes, and other biomolecular actors.

entity_classes.label: Chemical Entity
entity_classes.description: Abstract class for small molecules, metabolites, and chemical intermediates distinct from the primary exposure agent.

entity_classes.label: Molecular Damage
entity_classes.description: Abstract class for molecular damage events such as DNA adducts, strand breaks, and covalent macromolecular modifications resulting from carcinogen exposure.

entity_classes.label: Biological Process
entity_classes.description: Abstract class for biological processes, signaling pathways, and coordinated cellular programs involved in carcinogenesis.

entity_classes.label: Carcinogen
entity_classes.description: An exogenous agent with carcinogenic classification (IARC or equivalent). May be a simple chemical, complex mixture, or physical agent.

entity_classes.label: Enzyme
entity_classes.description: An enzyme mediating biotransformation, detoxification, or repair. Includes CYPs, GSTs, NATs, ADH/ALDH, UGTs, and DNA repair enzymes.

entity_classes.label: Metabolite
entity_classes.description: A chemical species produced during metabolic biotransformation. Includes activated proximate/ultimate carcinogens, reactive intermediates, and detoxification products.

entity_classes.label: DNA Adduct
entity_classes.description: A covalent modification of DNA resulting from carcinogen activation. Includes bulky adducts, oxidative adducts (8-OHdG), and crosslinks.

entity_classes.label: Pathway
entity_classes.description: A biological process or signaling pathway relevant to carcinogenesis. Encompasses oxidative stress, DNA damage response, immune modulation, and epigenetic regulation.

module_classes.label: Exposure Source
module_classes.description: Module class for exogenous agent sources and exposure families. Governs ExposureSourceModule interface.

module_classes.label: Biotransformation Process
module_classes.description: Module class for metabolic activation, detoxification, conjugation, and flux computation. Governs BiotransformationModule interface.

module_classes.label: Mechanism
module_classes.description: Module class for pathway perturbation and carcinogenic process logic. Governs MechanismModule interface.

module_classes.label: Tissue Context
module_classes.description: Module class for tissue-specific context and expression weighting. Governs TissueContextModule interface.

module_classes.label: Modifier
module_classes.description: Module class for host-side susceptibility modifiers including germline variation and genotype. Governs SusceptibilityModifierModule interface.

module_classes.label: Outcome
module_classes.description: Module class for endpoint states and mutational signatures. Governs OutcomeModule interface.

module_classes.label: Evidence & Provenance
module_classes.description: Module class for evidence bundles and provenance records. Governs EvidenceAndProvenanceModule interface.

maturity_classes.label: Descriptive
maturity_classes.description: Browsable graph and evidence content without formal causal interpretation.

maturity_classes.label: Causal
maturity_classes.description: Edges and motifs have explicit directional or mediator semantics.

maturity_classes.label: Executable
maturity_classes.description: Module has typed inputs/outputs plus a scoring rule or update function.

maturity_classes.label: Twin-ready
maturity_classes.description: Module outputs map directly into Cancer Ecology Digital Twin state variables.
